---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Report a gap, error, or improvement for docs
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What needs improving?

Which page, section, or file has the issue? (e.g. README, GitHub Pages, CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Current state

What does it say now (or what's missing)?

## Suggested improvement

What should it say or include instead?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or references that would help.
